Class ReforgeManager

java.lang.Object
dev.agam.skyblockitems.reforge.ReforgeManager
public class ReforgeManager extends Object
Manages the reforge system - loading reforges from configuration, providing access to reforges, and handling reforge application logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ReforgeManager(SkyBlockItems plugin)

    Description

    Formats a stat ID into its translated display name.

    Gets all loaded reforges.

    Gets all reforges compatible with an item type that also meet the rarity requirement.

    Get the reforges configuration for direct editing.

    Gets a reforge by its ID.

    Retrieves the symbol (icon) for a stat from MMOItems translation configs.
    void

    Loads or reloads the reforges configuration from reforges.yml.

    Reloads the reforges configuration.
    void

    Saves the reforges configuration to file.

    Update or create a reforge in the configuration and reload.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReforgeManager

      public ReforgeManager(SkyBlockItems plugin)

  • Method Details

    • loadConfig

      public void loadConfig()
      Loads or reloads the reforges configuration from reforges.yml.

    • getStatFormat

      public String getStatFormat()

    • formatStatName

      public String formatStatName(String raw)
      Formats a stat ID into its translated display name. Favors the MMOItems API for 100% accuracy.

    • getReforge

      public Reforge getReforge(String id)
      Gets a reforge by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The reforge ID (case-insensitive)
      Returns:
      The Reforge object, or null if not found

    • getAllReforges

      public Collection<Reforge> getAllReforges()
      Gets all loaded reforges.
      Returns:
      Collection of all reforges

    • getReforgesForItemType

      public List<Reforge> getReforgesForItemType(String itemType)
      Gets all reforges compatible with a specific item type.
      Parameters:
      itemType - The item type (e.g., "SWORD", "PICKAXE")
      Returns:
      List of compatible reforges

    • getApplicableReforges

      public List<Reforge> getApplicableReforges(String itemType, String currentRarity)
      Gets all reforges compatible with an item type that also meet the rarity requirement.
      Parameters:
      itemType - The item type
      currentRarity - The current rarity of the item
      Returns:
      List of applicable reforges

    • getRandomReforge

      public Reforge getRandomReforge(String itemType, String currentRarity, String excludeReforgeId)
      Gets a random reforge for the given item type and rarity, excluding the specified reforge.
      Parameters:
      itemType - The item type
      currentRarity - The current rarity
      excludeReforgeId - The reforge ID to exclude (current reforge), can be null
      Returns:
      A random applicable reforge, or null if none available

    • saveConfig

      public void saveConfig()
      Saves the reforges configuration to file.

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Reloads the reforges configuration.

    • getConfig

      public org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration getConfig()
      Get the reforges configuration for direct editing.

    • saveReforge

      public void saveReforge(String id, String displayName, List<String> itemTypes, Map<String, Reforge.RarityData> rarityDataMap, ReforgeGem gem)
      Update or create a reforge in the configuration and reload.

    • getGemItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getGemItem(String gemId)
      Gets a gem item stack for the given gem ID. Note: Gems are defined within individual reforges in our system.
      Parameters:
      gemId - The gem ID to search for
      Returns:
      The Gem ItemStack, or null if not found

    • getStatSymbol

      public String getStatSymbol(String statIdRaw)
      Retrieves the symbol (icon) for a stat from MMOItems translation configs.
      Parameters:
      statIdRaw - The raw stat ID
      Returns:
      The symbol, or "■" as fallback
